description_long: This bungalow features a modern, minimalist design with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The front facade is characterized by a prominent entryway, flanked by a paved walkway and landscaped greenery, including shrubs and small trees. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the structure, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The exterior is finished in a striking combination of dark and light surfaces, with the main body in black and the roof in a contrasting light gray. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing privacy. The overall structure sits low to the ground, typical of bungalow architecture, and is surrounded by paved and landscaped areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with dark walls, large asymmetrical windows, and landscaped entryway. The design is minimalist with clean lines and contrasting light and dark surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved walkway, and landscaped greenery with prominent dark facade and large windows.
description_view_1: Rear view with a plain light facade, several large windows, and minimal landscaping visible.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the flat roof, simple wall surfaces, and a few asymmetrically placed windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a mix of large and small windows, dark wall surfaces, and a glimpse of the landscaped entry.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
